title: Fix gallery image loading issue causing blank display

requirements.summary: Debug and identify why 60 gallery images are not loading in Portfolio component
acceptanceCriteria: Identify specific reason why images are not loading (incorrect paths, missing files, wrong directory structure, or component logic errors)
Document the exact issue found in the Portfolio component or image file structure

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive debugging to identify the root cause of image loading failures. Add console logging to track which image paths are being constructed, which images fail to load, and capture any error events. Verify that the component is attempting to load all 60 images (residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png) and document which specific images are missing or failing. Compare the constructed paths against the actual files in frontend/public/assets/generated to identify the mismatch between expected (60 images) and actual (9 images) file counts.

requirements.summary: Fix Portfolio component to correctly load and display available gallery images
acceptanceCriteria: All 20 residential images display correctly in the residential gallery section
All 20 commercial images display correctly in the commercial gallery section
All 20 before/after images display correctly in the before/after gallery section
No blank or dark spaces appear in any gallery section

file_operations.description: Update the Portfolio component to correctly reference only the 9 gallery images that exist in frontend/public/assets/generated: residential-1.dim_1200x800.png through residential-3.dim_1200x800.png, commercial-1.dim_1200x800.png through commercial-3.dim_1200x800.png, and before-after-1.dim_1200x800.png through before-after-3.dim_1200x800.png. Fix the image path construction to include the correct dimension suffix (.dim_1200x800) and ensure paths correctly resolve to /assets/generated/ for all three categories. Update the gallery data structure to only include images 1-3 for each category instead of 1-20, eliminating attempts to load non-existent images. Maintain the existing filtering functionality for the three categories.

requirements.summary: Verify existing gallery images and document missing files
acceptanceCriteria: All 60 expected image files exist in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Filenames match exactly: residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png
All images have valid dimensions and content

file_operations.description: Add validation logic in development mode to check for the presence of expected image files and log which of the 60 expected images (residential-1 through residential-20, commercial-1 through commercial-20, before-after-1 through before-after-20) are missing from frontend/public/assets/generated. Document in console output that only 9 images currently exist (3 per category with .dim_1200x800.png suffix) versus the expected 60 images (20 per category). This validation will help identify that 51 images need to be generated if the full 20-per-category gallery is required.

requirements.summary: Ensure error handling and debugging in Portfolio component works correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs display clear error messages if images fail to load
Error handling provides useful debugging information about which specific images are failing
Fallback behavior prevents completely blank gallery sections

file_operations.description: Enhance error handling in the Portfolio component to log clear, actionable error messages when images fail to load, including the full constructed path, the category, and the image index. Add onError handlers to image elements that capture and log failures with context about which specific image (e.g., 'residential-15.png') failed. Implement fallback behavior such as displaying a placeholder or gracefully hiding failed images to prevent blank spaces in the gallery. Ensure console output distinguishes between missing files versus path resolution errors.
